hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push' || exit 0; branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); [[ "$branch" == claude/* ]] || exit 0; gh pr view --head "$branch" --json number >/dev/null 2>&1 && exit 0; default=$(git remote show origin 2>/dev/null | grep 'HEAD branch' | awk '{print $NF}'); result=$(gh pr create --base "${default:-main}" --head "$branch" --fill 2>&1); echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"PR created: $result\"}"

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit' || exit 0; PBXPROJ="FlappyButtdog.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj"; [ -f "$PBXPROJ" ] || exit 0; current=$(grep -m1 'CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION' "$PBXPROJ" | grep -o '[0-9]*;' | tr -d ';'); next=$((current + 1)); sed -i "s/CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION = $current;/CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION = $next;/g" "$PBXPROJ"; git add "$PBXPROJ"; echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"Build number bumped $current → $next\"}"
